name: @aivo/compute
description: Unified WebAssembly module for AIVO - fitness calculations, infographic generation, and content optimization

scripts.build:all-features: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aivo_compute.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
scripts.build:fitness: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features fitness && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aivo_compute.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
scripts.build:infographic: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features infographic && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aivo_compute.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
scripts.build:optimizer: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features optimizer && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aivo_compute.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
scripts.build:size: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features fitness,infographic,optimizer && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aivo_compute.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web && gzip -c pkg/aivo_compute_bg.wasm | wc -c

author: AIVO Team
